titleStmt.title: SII 40.347: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 347. (A.R. No. B. 401 of 1933.) Śivagaṅga(near Masulipatnam), Bandar Taluk, Krishna District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On the left side of the entrance into the garbhagṛiha of the Mahishāsuramardini temple.
This is dated Śaka 1721, Raudri, Chaitra, śu. 5, Sunday.

Records the consecration of the images of the god Vidyāśaṅkarēśvara and the goddess Nagaripuri Durgābhavāni, the family deity of the Dēvarakōṭa chiefs, on the bank of the Śivagaṅga by Rājā Yērlagaḍḍa Aṅkinēḍu-Bahadaru. The ceremony was performed by Abhinavōddaṇḍa Śaṅkara Bhāratīsvāmi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī jagajjananīyājñādhārakulagu
rājā yērlagaḍḍa Aṁkinēḍu bahada
ru dēvarakōṭa saṁsthānādhipula pra
tyēkārādhana koraku tamakuladēvata
yagu śrīmadakhilāṁḍakōṭi brahmāṁ
ḍa nāyakurālayni śrīnagaripuri
du¨rgābhavānī mahārāṇī
Aṁmmavārini śrīvidyāśaṁkarē
śvara sahitaṁbuga śivagaṁga
tīramunaṁdu nūtanamugā
nirmāṇamu cēyiṁcina yī Āla
yamulō svasti śrī śālivāhana
śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1721 ki sari
riyagu raudhri saṁ . caitra śu 5
bhānuvāsaraṁbuna śrīmada
bhinavōddaṁḍa śaṁkarabhāratī
svāmulavāricēta pratiṣṭa cē
yiṁci vrāyiṁcina śilā
śāsanamu śrī
Digital edition of SII 40.347 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
